name: Seasoned Tempeh Filling in a Steamed Wonton S
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Tempeh, precooked; grated or minced fine
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine half of the tempeh with tamari, water, oil, honey, and cornstarch in a blender and puree.
2. Take the other half of the tempeh and mix with the vegetables.
3. Add the puree to the vegetable mixture and hand mix thoroughly.
4. Place 1 rounded teaspoon of this filling in the center of each wonton skin.
5. Moisten the outer rim of the wonton skin, then fold it in half to seal.
6. Steam for 8 minutes.
7. Serve with Sweet and Sour Sauce.
Comments and/or improvements are welcome. Gunter Pfaff, 73740,2515
Notes: Nobody should try to make this alone, its a great group project for four.
We use a tempeh made with soybeans and barley.
